title: anthyllis langei
intro: Anthyllis langei, also known as the Alpine Kidney Vetch, is a flowering plant species native to the European Alps. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving kidney function, and treating conditions such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. Anthyllis langei can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
